name: inferenceui
description: Open-source UI for compute exchanges, runtime control planes, and inference platforms.

scripts.build:packages: bun run build:tokens && bun run build:ui
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/ui typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/showcase typecheck
scripts.publish:dry: bun run build:packages && cd packages/tokens && npm publish --dry-run && cd ../ui && npm publish --dry-run
